ABOUT

I am a digital marketing freelancer with experience in SEO, paid advertising, and website management. I help businesses grow their online presence, increase website traffic, and generate quality leads through strategic digital marketing. I started my career as a computer operator and later worked as a Chat Support Executive at BlackBuck, where I developed strong communication and problem-solving skills. Currently, I work with local businesses and provide digital marketing services to help them reach more customers online.
